calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Akiko Takeshita, Esq. for and with Petitioner: Blanche Jaurigui.

Respondent: Ted Querubin was present in propria persona.

Prior to the commencement of the hearing the parties were sworn by the Clerk.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's request is Denied without prejudice.
